phase12_exhaustive_retest.description: Phase 12 全量穷举重测 — 验证规则引擎从 2.8/24 → 目标 12+/24

metadata.name: 全量穷举重测 — 对比 Phase 12 修复前后

phase12_exhaustive_retest.overview: Phase 12 实现了 FallbackEngine 教学模板库、上下文感知、鼓励性个性化注入、诊断题修复。 现在需要通过完整的 256 组合穷举测试来量化验证改进效果。 本轮测试分两阶段： - 阶段 A：快速验证（20 组合样本，仅 LLM OFF）— 确保无严重退化 - 阶段 B：全量穷举（256 组合完整运行）— 最终量化报告

step.name: 1. 清理旧进度文件
step.description: 确保测试从全新状态开始，不混入旧数据

step.name: 2. 确认 API Key 已设置
3. 确认文件完整性
step.description: 确认 FallbackEngine 代码和测试脚本就绪
step.commands: ls -la /d/Claudedaoy/coherence/src/coach/fallback.py ls -la /d/Claudedaoy/coherence/tests/test_exhaustive_all_configs.py python -c "from src.coach.fallback import FallbackEngine; print('FallbackEngine OK')"

step.name: 4. 确认测试话题池
step.command: python -c " from tests.test_exhaustive_all_configs import build_dialogue_pool pool = build_dialogue_pool() print(f'Dialogue pool: {len(pool)} topics') for k in list(pool.keys())[:5]: print(f' {k}: {len(pool[k])} turns') "

phase_a_quick_validation.label: 阶段 A: 快速验证 (20 LLM OFF 组合样本)
phase_a_quick_validation.description: 只运行 LLM OFF 的 20 个组合样本（快速，约 30 秒）， 确认 FallbackEngine 是否生效、无退化。
phase_a_quick_validation.command:
python -c " import sys, json, random sys.path.insert(0, '.') from tests.test_exhaustive_all_configs import ( generate_all_combos, run_combo_subprocess, build_dialogue_pool )
pool = build_dialogue_pool() topics = list(pool.keys()) all_combos = [(l,c) for l,c in generate_all_combos() if not c.get('llm.enabled')] random.shuffle(all_combos) sample = all_combos[:20]
results = [] for i, (label, combo) in enumerate(sample): topic = topics[i % len(topics)] r = run_combo_subprocess(label, combo, pool[topic], topic) if r.get('ok'): turns = r['results'] scores = [t['total_score'] for t in turns] avg = sum(scores)/len(scores) llm_cnt = sum(1 for t in turns if t.get('llm')) results.append({'label': label, 'topic': topic, 'avg': avg, 'llm': f'{llm_cnt}/{len(turns)}'}) print(f'[{i+1}/20] {label:30s} topic={topic:20s} avg={avg:.1f}/24 llm={llm_cnt}/{len(turns)}') else: print(f'[{i+1}/20] {label:30s} FAILED: {r.get(\"error\",\"?\")}')
if results: all_avg = sum(r['avg'] for r in results)/len(results) print(f'\n=== Phase A Result ===') print(f'Sample LLM OFF avg: {all_avg:.1f}/24 (n={len(results)})') print(f'Baseline (before Phase 12): 2.8/24') print(f'Improvement: {all_avg - 2.8:+.1f}/24') with open('reports/phase12_quick_validation.json', 'w') as f: json.dump({'avg': round(all_avg, 1), 'samples': results}, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) "

expected_outcome.llm_generated: 0/5 (必须全部为 0，确保 LLM 未参与)

gates.gate: Phase A 20 组合全部 PASS，无 FAILED
LLM OFF avg ≥ 8.0/24（低于此值说明 FallbackEngine 未生效）
所有回复的 llm=0/5（确保 LLM 真正关闭）

phase_b_full_exhaustive.label: 阶段 B: 全量穷举 (256 组合完整运行)
phase_b_full_exhaustive.description: 运行全部 256 组合，包含 LLM ON 和 LLM OFF 各 128 组合。 生成与 Phase 12 前可对比的完整报告。 预计耗时 45-65 分钟。

comparison_analysis.label: 报告解读 — 对比 Phase 12 前后

metric.name: LLM OFF avg quality
metric.formula: 从 JSON report.overall_avg 按 config filter
metric.command: python -c " import json r = json.load(open('reports/exhaustive_all_configs_report.json', encoding='utf-8')) sc = r.get('summaries_compact', {}) llm_off = [v['quality'] for k,v in sc.items() if v['quality'] <= 10] if llm_off: print(f'LLM OFF avg: {sum(llm_off)/len(llm_off):.1f}/24 (n={len(llm_off)})') llm_on = [v['quality'] for k,v in sc.items() if v['quality'] > 10] if llm_on: print(f'LLM ON avg: {sum(llm_on)/len(llm_on):.1f}/24 (n={len(llm_on)})') "

metric.name: 6 维度平均 (LLM OFF)

pass_criteria.criterion: LLM ON avg 无退化（仍在 16.0+）

rollback_if_failed.condition: LLM OFF avg < 8.0/24 或 失败率 > 5%
rollback_if_failed.action: 1. 检查 src/coach/fallback.py 是否被正确加载 2. 检查 agent.py 中 LLM OFF 分支是否调用了 FallbackEngine 3. 检查 config/coach_defaults.yaml 中 fallback_templates 段语法 4. 运行 python -m pytest tests/test_fallback_engine.py -v 确认单元测试通过 5. 修复后重新执行 Phase A

quick_reference_single_command.label: 一条命令跑完全程 (后台)
quick_reference_single_command.full_command: export DEEPSEEK_API_KEY="YOUR_DEEPSEEK_API_KEY" cd /d/Claudedaoy/coherence && \ rm -f reports/exhaustive_all_configs_progress.json reports/exhaustive_all_configs_test.log reports/exhaustive_all_configs_report.json && \ python tests/test_exhaustive_all_configs.py
quick_reference_single_command.background_command: nohup bash -c 'export DEEPSEEK_API_KEY="YOUR_DEEPSEEK_API_KEY" && cd /d/Claudedaoy/coherence && rm -f reports/exhaustive_all_configs_progress.json reports/exhaustive_all_configs_test.log reports/exhaustive_all_configs_report.json && python tests/test_exhaustive_all_configs.py' > reports/exhaustive_phase12_run.log 2>&1 &

deliverables.item: reports/exhaustive_all_configs_test.log — 末尾 FINAL REPORT 段
reports/phase12_quick_validation.json — Phase A 快速验证结果
此文档填写的比较表 — Phase 12 前后对比
